        Identitycurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.identity = ok id ∧
          ConstantTimeEqcurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.ct_eq e8 id = ok eq_choice ∧
            (b = true ↔ eq_choice = Choice.one)
